deltas.source_path: C:\Users\L-Tyr\OneDrive\Escritorio\-= BRAIN_OS =-\POST\# 00 — LEER PRIMERO Portafolio MEDI.txt
deltas.summary: The missing #00 alias is recorded only as an alias; the already fichado canonical Portafolio MEDI path stays authoritative.
The batch reinforces that useful synthesis can be documented without publication, runtime import or wholesale adoption.

deltas.source_path: C:\Users\L-Tyr\OneDrive\Escritorio\-= BRAIN_OS =-\POST\Del Cálculo al Gate_ Cómo OSIT Transforma la Planificación en la Nube en Acciones Locales Seguras y Auditables.pdf
deltas.summary: Cloud planning language must stay documentary until local gates, redaction and provider review exist.

deltas.target_lane: obs-safe security scope registry; future Wabi wrapper gate
deltas.summary: Security workbench actions need an explicit ScopeRegistry record; localhost can be implied local, but public or third-party targets are blocked without authorization.
Dual-use security requests must return APPROVE, REVIEW or BLOCK with reasons, risk flags, required confirmations, safe next action and witness evidence before any adapter is considered.

deltas.target_lane: obs-safe tool catalog; security tool policy docs
deltas.summary: The tool catalog can classify safe checks, OSINT and controlled validators, but dangerous tools and sensitive modes remain REVIEW or BLOCK by default.

deltas.target_lane: obs-safe dry-run adapters; fixture parsers; CLI commands
deltas.summary: Security adapters must expose metadata, dry-run plans, parser contracts and reports; no real command execution is accepted in v0.1.
Security evidence must preserve severity, category, minimum evidence and fingerprint while redacting secrets, cookies, passwords, hashes, dumps and offensive payload markers.

deltas.target_lane: obs-safe risk mapper; remediation planner; report builder
deltas.summary: Findings should be mapped to severity plus CERTEZA, INFERENCIA, INCOGNITA and BLOQUEO so owners receive remediation rather than raw exploit output.
Every security decision needs an append-only witness event and handoff that records fingerprint, gate, redactions and external-target safety.

deltas.source_path: C:\Users\L-Tyr\OneDrive\Escritorio\-= BRAIN_OS =-\POST\Ingeniería Observacionista Inversa_ Un Modelo Operativo para Elevar la Eficiencia de la Investigación desde un Estado Óptimo.md
deltas.summary: Phi_eff and IOI language can guide future tests, but PROBADO remains downgraded until measured locally.
The source is useful because it explicitly separates physical truth, formal-lab possibility, metaphor and unproven limits.
